tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Native View Panel Readback
trigger_conditions: Use when DCOIR needs evidence of saved Airtable native view Filter/Sort panel configuration, especially when Airtable connector/API record reads cannot prove saved native view state.
input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT and DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR Local Configuration Registry variables, Node.js, Playwright dependencies from the WBS09 UI tool prereq installer, a logged-in Chrome profile or CDP-attached Chrome session, and wbs09_airtable_native_views_manifest.json.
output_contract: Writes dcoir_wbs09_view_panel_readback_* folders under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR with launcher log, tool log, per-view JSON reports, DOM evidence, summary JSON, and optional screenshots. Use New-DcoirChatGPTFriendlyZip.ps1 to package evidence for upload.
safety_preconditions: Read-only only. Does not create, edit, or delete Airtable views, fields, records, tables, or automations. Use representative readback before all-manifest readback. All-manifest mode requires ConfirmToken READBACK_ALL_MANIFEST_VIEWS.
notes: Promote as readback-only. Do not represent create/repair automation as ready based on this tool. Repair/create should be handled by a separate discovery-plan-execute-verify pipeline after action primitives are hardened.
